name: update_record
description: Update fields on one or more existing records in an Airtable table. Uses PATCH semantics, meaning only the fields you specify will be updated; all other fields remain unchanged. You can update up to 10 records per request.

parameters.name: baseId
parameters.description: The ID of the base containing the table (starts with 'app').

parameters.name: tableIdOrName
parameters.description: The ID or URL-encoded name of the table containing the records.

parameters.name: records
parameters.description: Array of record objects, each with 'id' and 'fields' properties. Maximum 10 records per request.

parameters.name: typecast
parameters.description: If true, Airtable will try to convert string values to the appropriate cell type.
